# tplinkeasysmart_vlans (Data Source)

Read the 802.1Q VLAN inventory from the switch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "tplinkeasysmart_vlans" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether 802.1Q VLAN mode is enabled on the switch.
- `max_vlans` (Number) Maximum VLAN entries supported by the switch UI.
- `port_num` (Number) Number of ports reported by the VLAN page.
- `vlan_count` (Number) Current number of VLAN entries reported by the switch.
- `vlans` (Attributes List) Current VLAN table entries reported by the switch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vlans))

<a id="nestedatt--vlans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vlans`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) VLAN display name reported by the switch.
- `tagged_ports` (List of Number) Tagged member ports for the VLAN.
- `untagged_ports` (List of Number) Untagged member ports for the VLAN.
- `vlan_id` (Number) Numeric VLAN identifier.
